name: Celanese Corporation
description: Celanese Corporation is a global chemical and specialty materials company that manufactures a wide variety of products essential to everyday living. As a leading producer of acetyl products, including acetic acid and vinyl acetate monomer, and engineered materials like polyacetal and liquid crystal polymers, Celanese serves diverse industries such as automotive, construction, consumer consumer goods, medical, and packaging. Headquartered in Irving, Texas, the company operates manufacturing facilities and technical centers worldwide, delivering innovative solutions and high-performance materials to customers globally.
